creator: ilya.bagleybter@gmail.com
text:
Yep I can confirm that that fixed it. 
ilya@ilyaBSD:/usr/ports/emulators/duckstation % duckstation-qt 
[    0.0471] I/QTTranslations: Loaded translation file for language en
[    0.0614] V/Bus: RAM is mapped at 0x875000000.

[    0.0743] I/Bus: Fastmem base: 0x8811bf000
[    0.0746] I/GameList: Scanning /home/ilya/Downloads/psx (recursively)
[    0.0748] D/GameList: Scanning '/home/ilya/Downloads/psx/sed/sed.exe'...
[    0.0748] D/GameList: Scanning '/home/ilya/Downloads/psx/Core-Temp-setup-v1.18.1.0.exe'...
[    0.1062] I/SDLInputSource: Using Controller DB from resources.
[    0.1082] I/SDLInputSource: 304 controller mappings are loaded.
[    7.8412] V/MemoryCard: Loaded memory card from /home/ilya/.local/share/duckstation/memcards/SLUS-01066_2.mcd

The "Saved memory card" was failing before but works now!
